description_long: This is an ornate floor lamp with a tall, slender, and intricately carved stand that features a spiral design along its central shaft. The lamp has a wide, round base for stability and a gracefully curved arm extending from the top, supporting a pleated, fabric lampshade. The lampshade is a warm beige color, diffusing light softly and adding a vintage or classic touch to the lamp's appearance. The arm of the lamp is decorated with openwork metal filigree, enhancing its decorative appeal. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with a fabric shade, and the lamp is designed to stand freely on the floor. This lamp would be suitable for placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or upscale public spaces where both illumination and decorative value are desired.
description: An ornate floor lamp with a spiral-carved stand, curved filigree arm, and a pleated beige fabric shade. The lamp combines decorative metalwork with a classic, vintage-inspired design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved filigree arm and pleated shade, with the spiral-carved stand and round base visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full shape of the pleated shade and the symmetrical alignment of the stand and base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the curved arm and shade extending in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pleated shade and the spiral detail of the stand, with the base centered.
